scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n server,web -c blue,magenta "bun run server" "bun run dev"
scripts.test: bun test --preload ./server/testPreload.ts --preload ./server/domPreload.ts shared server scripts src/history src/api.test.ts src/api/client.test.ts src/i18n/translations.test.ts src/hooks/selectionUtils.test.ts src/hooks/useMediaQuery.test.ts src/components/GraphErrorBoundary.test.tsx
scripts.openapi:check: bun -e "import { validateOpenApiDocument } from './shared/openapi.ts'; const p = validateOpenApiDocument(); if (p.length) { console.error(p.join('\n')); process.exit(1); } console.log('OpenAPI OK');"
